namespaceNote: Tool ABI keeps the ARCHITOKEN_* environment variables and architoken.* report schema identifiers of the authorized first-party integration. The public command contract is the panaec-* CLI names.

tools.summary: DWG geometry through the LibreDWG native JSON dump into a real IFC4 geometry exchange file. The IFC output is a derivative; the DWG stays source of record.
DXF 3D entities into IfcTriangulatedFaceSet exchange geometry with SJG 157 layer-name classification. Pure 2D drawings are reported honestly as non-convertible, never faked into 3D.
STEP/IGES/STL into real-geometry IFC4 through FreeCAD/OCCT.
Rhino/OpenNURBS 3DM meshable geometry into IFC4 tessellated exchange objects, upgraded to real IFC types by component name where the SJG 157 dictionary matches.

runtime: user-provided licensed SketchUp sidecar over HTTP
tools.summary: SketchUp SKP through a lawful licensed sidecar adapter. No reverse engineering; the sidecar endpoint is user-provided configuration.

runtime: user-provided licensed SketchUp sidecar over HTTP
tools.summary: SketchUp SKP to GLB visual derivative through the same lawful sidecar adapter. The GLB is a labelled derivative, not proof of BIM semantics.
IFC bill of materials with measured geometry quantities for building components (walls, slabs, doors, windows, stairs, roofs, finishes) and SJG 157 semantic codes.
STEP/IGES bill of materials through FreeCAD/OCCT shape inspection.
Drawing block-reference quantity takeoff with SJG 157 semantics; DWG input passes through a real LibreDWG conversion first.
PDF drawing-sheet schedules exported verbatim from vector text tables, with page and table provenance. Scanned PDFs without vector text are reported honestly as having no extractable tables.
OpenUSD scene bill of materials through the same three.js USD parser used by the source viewer, grouping instances by geometry data blocks with bounding boxes.
Upgrades IfcBuildingElementProxy objects to real IFC entity types by component name and attaches SJG 157-2024 classification references, preserving GlobalIds.
Local IFC schema/EXPRESS rule validation with a structured passed/failed report. No external service dependency.
Atomic source IFC attribute and property-set editing with a whitelist of direct attributes. Any single failed operation fails the whole edit; no partial writes.

data.summary: SJG 157-2024 semantic dictionary: component-name and layer-name substring rules mapped to IFC entity types, SJG component codes, and category names. Single source of truth shared by the BOM and IFC enrichment tools.
